programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In this special, Professor Alice Roberts reveals the forgotten story of the Roman Armys secret weapon in Britain - their cavalry. These fearsome horsemen were the key to defending Britains most famous Roman monument fortification, Hadrians Wall.

programme.title: Empire Builders
programme.desc: Explore how the Polynesians spread across the Pacific and examine the cultures they took with them while constructing elaborate temples to their beliefs.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ancient Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: Homicide detective Rod Demery and forensic scientist Turi King examine a murder victim dated to the time of the Picts, unearthed in a remote sea cave in Scotland.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Built by William the Conqueror, the Tower of London is one of Britains most iconic landmarks. It has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution, a silent witness to some of the most momentous events in our history. Dan Jones reveals some of its fascinating secrets and tells the stories of the traitors, rebels and royalty who met their end inside its imposing walls.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan is in the heart of the English countryside at Warwick Castle. While it appears idyllic today, for centuries it was a poisoned chalice to the Earls of Warwick who lived there and its walls echo with tales of betrayal, bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: In Portsmouth, Alice Roberts learns about Nelsons dark side, the heat of the battle at Trafalgar, the role of the Navy in the British Empire, and the lives of sex workers.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits Elizabethan Plymouth, exploring the story of Englands `Golden Age, from Sir Francis Drake to the Spanish Armada, piracy, theft, and the slave trade.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Arctic conditions continue to wreak havoc in British Columbia, while Jeremy Birch is called upon to raise a concrete-hulled vessel.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Following the best marine salvage teams in the world as they race against the clock to recover ships wrecked by fierce storms that rage across the globe.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts celebrates the biggest and best archaeological discoveries of 2018 from the north of the UK, starting with a prehistoric Pompeii at the Black Loch of Myrton.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: We join a team as they undertake the largest maritime investigation since the Mary Rose and reveal the extraordinary story of HMS Invincible.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan is in the heart of the English countryside at Warwick Castle. While it appears idyllic today, for centuries it was a poisoned chalice to the Earls of Warwick who lived there and its walls echo with tales of betrayal, bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones is in the heart of Snowdonia exploring a stronghold built not only as an impenetrable fortress but also as a lavish royal palace fit for a fairytale - Caernarfon Castle.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: In Belfast, the UKs most Victorian city, Alice Roberts visits the shipyards that built the Titanic, gets locked up in the Crumlin Road gaol and learns about 19th-century etiquette.

programme.title: Britains Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores British history through the stories of individual towns and examines Britain in wartime by looking at the coastal town of Dover.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, there was a sure-fire way to earn a living along the Cornish coast: smuggling. The great walking country is home to tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves which were once ideal for the infamous illicit imports.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits Liverpool and Lancashire for a towpath exploration of grand industrial engineering along the majestic Leeds and Liverpool Canal.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Skeletons tell of both violent death and tenderness at the royal seat of power in Bamburgh, Northumbria, while at a remarkable community project at a shopping centre in Sittingbourne, people curate the grave goods of their own ancestors.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In the final episode Dr Alice Roberts goes in search of the Tudor age, a time that saw momentous changes across all aspects of British life. Along the way Alice visits excavations at Shakespeares first theatre in Londons Shoreditch, where the Bard began his career and `Romeo and Juliet was first performed. Alice also joins a team sifting through Shakespeares rubbish at his last home in Stratford-Upon-Avon.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Following the best marine salvage teams in the world as they race against the clock to recover ships wrecked by fierce storms that rage across the globe.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: A veteran comes to the rescue for a crew that has lost a valuable clam dredge in stormy waters. Unable to fish without it, their livelihoods are at stake.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: After seizing power in 1933, Adolf Hitler began systematically transforming a peaceful German population into a ruthless war machine. Experts investigate the innovative methods used by the Nazis to indoctrinate and control the will of its citizens.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: The Secrets Of The Devils Bible
programme.desc: "The Codex Gigas," also known as the "Devils Bible," is a giant medieval tome that has evoked fear for centuries and believed to contain a malevolent power. Experts investigate its legendary secrets and uncover the mystery behind its author.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: The dramatic moors and valleys of West Yorkshire are the setting for an unusual slice of the past in Tony Robinsons first walk from this new series. This evocative landscape was the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontes, the remarkable literary family that produced Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson visits the Cairngorms National Park to discover how Queen Victoria and Prince Albert helped to shape Scottish traditions and imagery such as tartan, bagpipes and caber tossing.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.desc: A 1930s bungalow in Dereham in Norfolk, a first-floor flat in Londons East Ham and a property in Maryport in Cumbria with a hidden room are all sold at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear their plans for their investments.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin, Lucy and Dion visit a fifth-floor flat in Greater Manchester, a three bed semi in Carlisle and three commercial buildings near Stanstead.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks round a pretty cottage with outbuildings with huge potential in Burton upon Trent, while Lucy checks out a flat in Londons Crystal Palace and Dion is in Mossley near Manchester in a four-bedroom bungalow.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin tackles the issue of solar panels on a property in Mountain Ash in Wales and wonders if itll be a sunny outcome for the new owner, while Lucy looks round a barn in Elstree in Hertfordshire and Dion visits a flat in Newport in Shropshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets a couple who buy a former millworkers cottage in Derbyshire as their first home together; Lucy Alexander meets a father and daughter team who are seasoned developers buying a house in Kent; and Dion Dublin talks to a man who, along with two friends, has clubbed together to buy an investment property in Lowestoft in Suffolk.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the worlds longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A vital witness to a gangland killing goes missing before she can give evidence in court. Frost is under extra pressure to find her and her son before the murderer can call in a hit man to eliminate them both.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police constable Nick Rowan finds himself on duty the moment he crosses the Aidensfield boundary. He and his wife have travelled up from London to Aidensfield, a little village in North Yorkshire.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Kate calls Nick lucky as he is already starting to feel quite comfortable after their move northwards. Nick pursues a moorland flasher and drunken hikers, while Kate encounters abuse when she helps a woman with a bullying husband, but its a bullying cleaner who makes the coppers fume.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Sergeant Dan Scott arrives to work with Barnaby and is thrown straight into a murder investigation in Midsomer Mallow. A noise heard near the scene of Fiona Thompsons bloodstained body leads police to suspect an odd-job man, but when the murder toll rises, Barnaby becomes concerned for Cully, who is organising a ten-year school reunion.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emmerdale is one of Britains best-loved and highly-viewed long-running drama soaps - set in the heart of the beautiful countryside of the Yorkshire Dales, this realistic and down-to-earth drama superbly chronicles the joys and the heartbreaks of a tightly-knit countryside community.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick gets an anonymous tip-off about a pop stars undesirable predilections, while a local shopkeeper, Charlie Denby, enjoys the company of young male customers, but some people think its too much. Claude applies to become the gardener of the elderly sisters.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Burning desires of all kinds bring problems for Nick and Kate. A wandering horse and wandering salmon also cause frustration.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin manages to offend the vicar on his wedding day. After the vicar is involved in an accident with Martin he has to find a replacement quick.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Since Martin and Louisa both got cold feet on their wedding day, Louisa has left, and Martin has been finding life in Portwenn infuriating. When he unexpectedly meets his old flame Edith, now a top-ranking doctor who is clearly surprised at the way his life has turned out, he starts to consider new directions, but Martins thoughts are turned upside down when Louisa returns - with big news of her own.

programme.desc: A charming show from Welsh comedian Robin Morgan, focusing on what it is to be a father and a son, and what makes a good role model in 2019.

programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa, George and Danny Dog to visit Grampy Rabbits lighthouse.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Suzy and Peppa start a Secret Club - going on secret missions, and doing secret things, but soon everyone wants to join.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has a new pen pal, a little donkey from France, named Delphine. Peppa receives letters from Delphine Donkey and speaks to her on the telephone. Although Peppa speaks English and Delphine speaks French, they discover that they love lots of the same things, especially jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig needs help when his boat sinks, so Granddad Dog gives them all a lift to Grampy Rabbits Boatyard so that the boat can be fixed.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle gives the class a music lesson. Theres lots of crashing and banging at first, but its not long before the grown-ups visit and lay down some notes of their own.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig loses his title as Champion Puddle Jumper, until everyone helps him train to win it back.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Georges toy basket is full and their beds are covered in toys, so Mummy Pig decides it is time to order a new toy cupboard. Luckily help is at hand, as Mr Zebra the Postman loves assembling flat pack furniture.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig needs a new watch, Mr Fox finds three grandfather clocks in the back of his van. Three clocks are much better than one. Mr Fox has everything in his van - even a chicken.

programme.desc: Peppa and George go to play with Cousin Chloe and her friends, but the older children dont want to play any `baby games.

programme.desc: Peppa and her family collect apples and blackberries in Granny and Grandpa Pigs garden to make a pie.

programme.desc: Mrs Zebra teaches Peppa, George, Zoe, Zaza and Zuzu Zebra how to make a real tea set from clay.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go to help at Edmond Elephants birthday party, but the little children are harder to look after than theyd thought.

programme.desc: Mummy Pig is confirming she is having a new baby. Mummy and Daddy Pig share the exciting news with Peppa and her brother, George.

programme.desc: There is a new girl at school, and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit. Molly shows them how good she is at digging while taking them on a tour of her underground house.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Tempers flare when the Chipmunks get stuck in traffic on the way to a show. Simon becomes annoyed by constant requests to fix things and plays dumb until he gets a thank you.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls reminisce about how they saved the tree from being cut down; Alvin and Theodore think that Simon is going away to boarding school.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simons lab to look at his latest invention, only to accidentally clone himself. With two Alvins, theres double the trouble. Alvin tells a small lie that quickly turns into a huge disaster, dragging everyone into his tangled web.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting is not easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment. When Alvins football team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvins babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvins assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: Of Mice and Munks; Simon Saves the World
programme.desc: The Chipettes fall in love with a mouse thats doomed to be fed to a snake as part of a science class; Simons new invention threatens to destroy the world.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany wind up in a battle over popping acorn tops and bubble wrap. When a cute girl joins the chess club, Alvin enlists Jeanette to teach him how to play so he can join as well.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Brittanys style icon proclaims Jeanette is a fashion trendsetter; Theodore thinks that he is a real superhero.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: The Chipettes set out to prove to Alvin and the boys that being a superhero isnt only a guy thing. Miss Smith tells Alvin that if he doesnt pass the next test, hell be held back a year and separated from his brothers.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When the boys accidentally break Daves new flat screen TV. they decide to become fugitives on the lam. Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodores teddy bear mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus, Dave has no idea of the problems ahead. Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvins too short to ride a new amusement park ride; while on a ski trip, Alvin convinces Theodore theres a Yeti nearby.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Stuck inside the house due to a storm, Simon invents a virtual reality game that quickly gets out of hand; Cheesy enlists Theodore and Alvin to help steal desserts from the school kitchen using secret underground tunnels.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol, but her idol only likes her art after Alvin ruins it; Alvin is convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move in to their home, so he tries to stop the invasion.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Dave gets temporary amnesia so the boys trick him into letting them skip school and go on a ski trip instead. Theodore becomes obsessed with cleanliness after a speaker at school talks to the class about the danger of germs.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: Big Bro Theodore / No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks hes the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon. Alvin tricks Theodore into believing hes great at mini golf, which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of Macbeth / Zeela The Great
programme.desc: The Chipmunks dont want to perform in the school play, after learning of its curse; Simons robot Geizmo becomes jealous of Jeanettes robot Zeela, until a sudden tragedy reveals Geizmos true heart.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: After Miss Smith praises Simons grades in class, Derek bullies him by not allowing him to use the boys bathroom.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: The Chipmunks and Chipettes try to reduce their carbon footprint when Jeanette signs them up for a Green Living competition.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: When an accident forces Simon to wear his old glasses, he becomes the target of the school bully. So Simon builds a homemade robot bodyguard!

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Alvin and the Chipmunks.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead. When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croners basement, the chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences. Brittanys furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog and vows to get him back.

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.desc: Mike is in Idaho to buy the ultimate retro sportster, the Karmann Ghia. Edd loves it, but will the broken gearbox and shoddy interior stop them making a profit?

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike is excited to pick up one of his favourite types of convertible: the 2000 Porsche 996. With only a few issues, this car will be an absolute steal for him.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: The pinnacle of BMW is the modern classic, the E46 M3. Mike finds one with the subframe already fixed, and he challenges Ant to transform the transmission with new tech.

programme.title: Shed and Buried: Classic Cars
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Henry and Fuzz take on a risky Triumph Spitfire that has been in a crash. In their biggest restoration challenge yet, can they fix it?

programme.title: Shed And Buried: Classic Helicopter
programme.desc: Henry Cole and friends Fuzz Townshend and Guy Willison hit the road to find, buy and make a profit from the UKs abandoned automotive gems.

programme.title: Richard Hammonds Workshop
programme.desc: Much excitement as the Cogs head to the Isle of Man TT to launch a new British bike brand. A racing Mini needs brutal surgery after a crash. And Hadrian calls time on Cog Racing so Richard enlists old friends Les and Zog as his stand-in race team.

programme.title: MotoGP Highlights
programme.desc: Sprint race action from the 2026 Grand Prix of Brazil at Autodromo Internacional de Goiania.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Motorcycle fanatic Henry Cole travels around the country with his mechanic mate Fuzz Townshend nosing around peoples sheds and garages in the hope of finding some automotive bargains.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team restore a pair of speedway racing boots, a 1960s electric organ, a handmade grandfather clock and a diary and writing slate.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus aims to help a couple recovering from life-threatening illnesses start a new life in a new home, if he can sell their huge collection of Glen Millar Vinyl and V-discs. And then he gets his hands on some nice jugs, in a home with a pub in it!

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Blacklighters have just one week left to strike opal before the blistering summer heat shuts them down. The Bushmen scramble to beat mechanical failures and rising temperatures.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Mine SOS
programme.desc: Paul Mackie and his team travel to Pilbara in Australias unforgiving west to help an indigenous family mine gold to save them from financial ruin.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the hidden logic behind the cryptic locations of the ancient Moai statues of Easter Island.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Experts unearth what appears to be a mysterious hole to hell surrounded by cryptic Pagan carvings in rural England. Experts use state-of-the-art forensics to investigate and uncover the dark secrets of this mystical site.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.sub-title: Turntable, Steam Engines, Playground Equipment, Teflon Pans
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how turntables, steam engines, playground equipment and non-stick pans are made.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.desc: How do they make garden forks, English toffee, paint chip cards, and Bundt pans? Find out here as more everyday items are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.sub-title: The Man in the Cowboy Hat
programme.desc: In 2016, in Kamloops, Canada, a motel cleaner finds the body of an unidentified woman in one of the rooms; detectives turn to surveillance cameras to track a mysterious suspect in a cowboy hat, leading to a desperate manhunt across Canada.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Susanne and Half Zantop are found murdered in their home. With no trace of forced entry, the FBI Behavioural Science Unit investigates the crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A convicted murderer breaks into the computer room of the New Mexico Penitentiary with a handgun and electronically opens six other inmates cells.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: The case of an 11-year-old boy who went missing near his home in Newcastle, and a known fantasist claims he has the body of a woman in the boot of his car but this time, he might just be telling the truth.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome felon Angel Garcia, its love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance leaves a trail of death and devastation.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: Lee disappeared one morning after leaving a friend, but had he gone into the wilds or joined the Israeli army? Follow the hunt for this troubled teen.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Nathan Trapuzzano is shot dead while taking his morning walk. Security footage from the scene shows the final shocking moments of Trapuzzanos life, but it may not be enough to help police hunt down his killer.

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill
programme.desc: After killing his first wife in a staged car crash and attempting to murder his second, Malcom Webster intended to use his nursing skills to kill a third woman before being caught.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Joy and Fred are high school sweethearts until a tragic work accident changes the course of their lives. As Joy tries to find a second shot at love, she confronts a heartbreaking tragedy.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In Knoxville, Tennessee, a seemingly perfect couple are secretly living a nightmare - the wife if found guilty of soliciting her new partner to kill her former husband.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Twenty four-year-old Alice Ruggles was a bright young woman who had everything to live for, until she met Lance Corporal Harry Dhillon. After a short-lived romance, Alice ended the relationship in the summer of 2016, whereupon Dhillon commenced his reign of stalking and threats, culminating in one final act of terror on the evening of the 12th October 2016.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A couple, just engaged, is found brutally murdered in a car. Investigators dont have a lead until a surveillance camera gives the police its first break.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A young couple go on a camping trip in Idaho and their two-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators work tirelessly to find him, and the parents become suspects.

programme.title: The Friday the 13th Murders
programme.desc: On Friday the 13th, 14-year-old Amber Dubois vanishes; a year later, Chelsea King disappears nearby; as fear spreads, a survivor links the two-and exposes a predator hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: The case of an 11-year-old boy who went missing near his home in Newcastle, and a known fantasist claims he has the body of a woman in the boot of his car but this time, he might just be telling the truth.

programme.title: Deadliest Families
programme.desc: In October 2022, 36-year-old Angie White is found dead at her home in Wales. Alexa recordings from the night of her murder help catch her killer.

programme.title: Deadliest Families
programme.desc: A mother-of-two vanishes from her home in Utah in 2009. As police investigate, dark family secrets emerge, and a tragedy follows that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2021, talented high school football star KJ Taylor is killed during a drive-by shooting outside a West Virginia convenience store. CCTV helps detectives follow the trail of the truck spotted stalking KJs friends leading up to the shooting.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2018, three women held hostage in a motel room by armed men face a night of terror that leaves 19-year-old Amber Meadows lying dead in the bathroom. Detectives must follow a trail of surveillance footage to find out who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Retells the 1996 investigation into the abduction of a 17-year-old boy from a shop near his home, followed by threatening demands for $30,000.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Looking at the phenomenon of high-profile criminal cases where people publically claim they are innocent about a crime they have committed.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: The investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms crack federal cases involving drugs, arson and weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: How advances in technology can expose a murderous liar, such as the man who staged his wifes suicide to cash in a $100,000 life insurance policy.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives are led down the Missouri River looking for a missing woman. And forensic experts must identify a murder victim and catch a killer from a few shreds of tape.

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories rock a small Texas town after a beloved high school football player mysteriously vanishes; baffling clues and community pressure pit the local sheriff against a brash private investigator until some very unusual suspects emerge.

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: A cold-blooded murderer takes the life of local football hero TK Kelly. The high school standout had carried the dreams of his small California city on his shoulders, but for someone close to TK, jealousy of the star was motivation enough to kill.

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: In a struggling Pennsylvania coal town, where high school football is king, the killing of a Mexican immigrant splits the community. When star players emerge as suspects, some locals engage in a coverup that is almost as shocking as the murder.

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: To say that Paul Reagor and Jerry Bailey are close friends would be an understatement. When the two football coaches mysteriously disappear, a small Oklahoma towns racial tensions are exposed along with the high stakes of high school football.

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: Former cheerleader Valerie Zavala is invited to a party with high school football players and cheerleaders; she is found dead; investigators collect home video from the party to find clues to identify her killer.

programme.title: Murder Under the Friday Night Lights
programme.desc: When the Broncos draught Texas high school football star Darrent Williams, he stays loyal to his hometown; on New Years, he flies five school friends to Denver for a party; soon after midnight, Darrent dies and no one knows who killed him, or why.

programme.title: Inside The Arrest
programme.desc: Its only when 35-year-old Virginia McCullough is arrested at her home for the murder of her parents that officers discover her gruesome secret.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
programme.desc: After Ranger James Holland receives a phone call from the Pennsylvania State Police, he finds himself face-to-face with a witness who could be the key to solving one of the oldest cold case mysteries in the history of the state.

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: Bestselling author, Helen Bailey, was a wealthy widow. After finding love again with Ian Stewart she vanished. He helps in the search - but was it a cover-up?

programme.title: Deadliest Families
programme.sub-title: A Mother, A Murder and A Manhunt
programme.desc: A bitter custody battle ends in tragedy when a toddler is found dead. A three-year manhunt ensues to track down her killer, her own mother.

programme.title: Deadliest Families
programme.desc: In 2021, 9-year-old Alfie Steele was found unresponsive. His mother is seemingly shocked, but the police soon become suspicious when they dig deeper.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2020, 21-year-old Dioneth Lopez goes missing while on a trip to visit friends. Her body turns up in the woodlands of Washington State. She is treated as a Jane Doe until detectives find surveillance footage that pieces together her final hour.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, police discover Demetrius Graves fatally stabbed on the street. Two days later, Bonnie Ross turns up dead at home. A trail of CCTV evidence uncovers that these two very different people share one fateful connection.

programme.desc: Motorhead reached the pinnacle of their artistic and commercial success with `Ace of Spades. Interviews with band members Lemmy, Phil Taylor and Eddie Clarke give a taste of what life was like in the metal band.

programme.title: Motorhead Live: Everything Louder Than Everyone Else
programme.desc: Motorhead perform live at Munichs Deutsches Museum in 1991.

programme.title: Deep Purple Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: The bands most commercially successful line-up featuring Ritchie Blackmore, Ian Gillan, Roger Glover, Jon Lord and Ian Paice reunite in 1984 for an electrifying concert in Melbourne.

programme.title: Johnson and Knopflers Music Legends
programme.desc: In conversation and song, Sir Tom Jones speaks with Brian Johnson and Mark Knopfler to share some captivating stories from his career, including his remarkable friendship with the King of Rock and Roll Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Simon and Garfunkel: Old Friends On Stage
Simon and Garfunkel: Old Friends On Stage
Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: The cynical commander of Allied Nations forces has to prevent a warlord from taking over the world. With 63 hostages held in his seemingly impregnable fortress, the warlord is demanding an outrageously hefty ransom.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandoras Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers encounter the mighty Kong and other monstrous creatures after travelling to an uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: Mikaela and Sam once again join forces with Optimus Prime again to save Earth from ruthless robot The Fallen.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Decepticons become involved in a space race to find a hidden Cybertronian spacecraft stranded on the Moon. Sam Witwicky must come to the aid of the Autobots to defeat the evil Decepticons to stop them discovering the secrets of the Cybertronian craft.

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: Billy Batson is a streetwise 14-year-old who can magically transform into the adult superhero Shazam simply by shouting out one word. His newfound powers soon get put to the test when he squares off against the evil Dr. Thaddeus Sivana.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Diana, princess of the Amazons, is raised to be an unconquerable warrior on a sheltered island paradise. She discovers her full powers and true destiny after leaving home to join the fight to end all wars.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Diana, princess of the Amazons, is raised to be an unconquerable warrior on a sheltered island paradise. She discovers her full powers and true destiny after leaving home to join the fight to end all wars.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Justice League Vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman, Batman and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train. They make a new friend and encounter heroes and villains in their quest to find a new home.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Extinct
programme.desc: Op and Ed accidentally time-travel from the Galapagos Islands in 1835 to present-day Shanghai. They make their way through the city in confusion and make the horrifying discovery that the species to which they belong became extinct shortly after.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of self-taught talking rats. When Maurice and the rodents meet a bookworm called Malicia, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: An ordinary chameleon, Rango, winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: When the beast-themed Animilitia plague Gotham, Batman swings out to investigate. But with The Penguin and his cyber-animals added to the mix, Batman will need the help of Green Arrow and The Flash to bring them to heel.

programme.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders
programme.desc: Batman and Robin have their hands full when Penguin, The Joker, Riddler and Catwoman join forces.

programme.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders
programme.desc: Batman and Robin have their hands full when Penguin, The Joker, Riddler and Catwoman join forces.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Brad and Dustys respective fathers show up to turn Christmastime upside down.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that shes never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, `Thunderbirds-style squad of puppets lead Americas war on terrorism. The creators of `South Park go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Dumped and depressed, English rose Iris agrees to swap homes with similarly unlucky in love Californian Amanda for a much-needed break. Iris finds herself in a palatial Hollywood mansion while Amanda navigates the lanes of a picture-perfect English village. Soon enough, both lovelorn ladies bump into local lads perfect for a romantic pick-me-up.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: High school oddball Ducky idolises his best friend Andie but shes smitten with wealthy classmate Blane who might be interested - if she wasnt so poor. Do the pair have a future together?

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: The story of Brian Cloughs 44 day stint as manager of Leeds United Football Club. England, in 1974. When Don Revie quits Leeds to become the England boss, the outspoken Brian Clough takes charge. Determined to impose his own style upon Revies tough tackling team, Clough soon alienates his players and the board. Based on the book by David Pearce.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen misunderstood by his family and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer struggling with addiction and debt while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: When his fathers job results in a family move to the countryside, young German boy Bruno misses his old friends. Roaming the grounds of the large country house he now calls home, he discovers the huge fenced facility that his dad Ralf, a Nazi officer, now manages. Approaching it, Bruno meets Shmuel, a fellow youngster on the other side of the barbed wire, wearing what appears to be a pair of pyjamas.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: grow
programme.desc: An exuberant tale full of giant pumpkins, madcap characters and a little girl who just might be a pumpkin-growing savant. (2025, 107 mins)

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he cant sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesnt belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumbles son Erik hasnt yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adelie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang, Mystery Inc, and their dopey mutt Scooby-Doo are back, this time investigating the spooky goings-on brought about by an evil genius intent on wreaking havoc in the town of Coolsville.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willys life and release him back into the wild.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: The Golden Child
programme.desc: A social worker who specialises in missing children is recruited to rescue a mystical Tibetan child from evil forces.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Dannys problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
programme.desc: A lonely and socially awkward woman tries to make a connection with a friendly new co-worker who takes her out on a date.

programme.title: Book of Love
programme.desc: Sparks fly between an uptight English writer and a Spanish translator who rewrote his failed book into an erotic novel.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary
programme.desc: A neurotic thirty-something resolves to take control of her life once and for all. She drinks, smokes and eats too much, and, worst of all, she falls for the wrong kind of man - passing over Mr Right for Mr Right Now. From the novel by Helen Fielding.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridgets brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Spanglish
programme.desc: After emigrating to America from Mexico with her daughter, Flor goes to work as a housekeeper for a chef and his insecure wife where she has to contend with learning a new language, her daughter approaching womanhood and an eccentric family. When Flor and her daughter Cristina are invited on holiday with the family, all the relationships involved take a new turn.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister witness a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: Fantastical creatures come to life when a girls sketchbook falls into a strange pond. As the town starts to unravel, she and her brother must track down the unpredictable, chaotic and dangerously real monsters before they cause permanent damage.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, Minnie discovers a bottle of tequila that allows her to travel through time, each shot taking her back to the start of the night, giving her the chance to alter the course of her millennium.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: Sketch
programme.desc: Fantastical creatures come to life when a girls sketchbook falls into a strange pond. As the town starts to unravel, she and her brother must track down the unpredictable, chaotic and dangerously real monsters before they cause permanent damage.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth
programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: Icefall
programme.desc: A young Native American game warden captures a notorious poacher only to learn that the poacher is aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars that has crashed in a frozen lake.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister witness a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Megan and Noah uncover a long-buried corpse in their parents basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating spiral of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: From Dusk Till Dawn 2: Texas Blood Money
programme.desc: A bank robber headed for a Mexican heist stumbles into a bar frequented by the undead, where hes turned into a vampire.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Blade II
programme.desc: Half-human, half-vampire Blade returns in this sequel to the original blockbuster, this time teaming up with arch-enemy Damaskinos who needs his help. A mutated race of vampires, the Reapers, are killing both humans and vampires and must be stopped before they gain too much power.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.

programme.title: Evolution

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: IT
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the towns children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Accompanied by her husband, son and daughter, Adelaide Wilson returns to the beachfront home where she grew up as a child. Haunted by a traumatic experience from the past, Adelaide grows increasingly concerned that something bad is going to happen. Her worst fears soon become a reality when four masked strangers descend upon the house, forcing the Wilsons into a fight for survival. When the masks come off, the family is horrified to learn that each attacker takes the appearance of one of them.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: Interstellar

programme.title: Until Dawn

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Running Man

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: I Am Legend
programme.desc: In the year 2012, scientists engineer a cure for cancer. Three years later, every human in New York is dead or mutated into a light-sensitive zombie by the virus that was supposed to heal. Only one man survives, virologist Robert Neville. He has two aims: find a cure for the virus and make contact with other survivors.

Turkish and Tommy team up with a pugilistic Irish gypsy named Mickey for the purpose of rigging unlicensed boxing matches. However, their opponent also arranges some dodgy betting with the courier of the stolen diamond, who subsequently goes missing. To complicate further, a New York gangster arrives on the scene.

programme.desc: Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the countrys various quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws.

programme.title: Border Security: Americas Front Line
programme.desc: Follow US border protection agencies as they man the front lines of national security.

programme.title: Border Security: Americas Front Line
programme.desc: Follow US border protection agencies as they man the front lines of national security.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A moral dilemma arises when a young Cardassian boy, orphaned during the war and raised by Bajoran parents, becomes a pawn in a political game.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team responds to a cry for help from a civilisation that traces its origins to Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager comes across a Klingon ship, the crew of which believe that BElannas unborn child is the saviour they have been seeking for over 100 years.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise and Ferengi starships must pass a crucial inquisition by the guardian of the Tkon Empire before continuing their trips through space.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Sarah and Becker investigate when the anomaly at Johnsons headquarters re-opens. Meanwhile, the rest of the team attempt to stop Helen at all costs, enduring a harrowing journey through time via several anomalies, battling future predators, raptors and pterosaurs. Elsewhere an encounter with the earliest humans has life-changing consequences for one of the group.

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Easy Company finally enter Germany, to little resistance, and have a chance to relax for the first time in a long while. A patrol in a nearby forest discovers an abandoned Nazi concentration camp, still filled with emaciated prisoners. Locals refuse to acknowledge the camps existence.

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: After capturing Eagles Nest, Hitlers mountaintop fortress, the men of Easy Company face deployment to the Pacific until the Japanese surrender ends the war.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick faces his greatest foe yet and looks to his ancestors for strength to save the world from a terrifying end. Monroe, Rosalee and Eve find a rare potion that might help in the fight, and Capt Renard and Adalind try to keep Diana and Kelly safe.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: In the wake of the American Civil War, a young martial arts prodigy, recently arrived from China, finds himself unwillingly dragged into the brutal, Chinatown Tong wars.

programme.title: The Force: Manchester
programme.desc: Fast-paced documentary series following the 999 work of Greater Manchester Police. Englands second largest police force, its responsible for protecting 2.7 million people.

programme.title: Brit Cops: Frontline Crime UK
programme.desc: Police in West Wales respond to a huge fight outside a nightclub and target the house of a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: Brit Cops: Frontline Crime UK
programme.desc: Police in West Wales respond to a huge fight outside a nightclub and target the house of a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.sub-title: Do As I Say, Not As I Do
programme.desc: A driver tries to pull off a dangerous manoeuvre in front of the officers.

programme.title: A Wild Year On Earth
programme.desc: Millions monarch butterflies converge in the forests Mexico. The Arctic skies blaze with the aurora borealis as Earth completes its annual cycle.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word oukurubes which means place of thunder in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are increasingly restless in the infirmary, but they have a few more weeks of recovery before returning to class.

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: The vets have Zebras on their minds. The endangered and beautiful Grevys zebras have to be isolated to bel breed. On the other side of the reserve, the more common zebras are destroying the cattles grazing land and have to be moved.

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: Vet Batian is leaving Ol Pejeta after six years and hes organizing his team for one last action: a massive translocation of three species-about 500 animals. But when things go wrong, the staff is forced to come up with plan B.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Three-year-old Wine ditches lessons to make a remarkable new friend, as she bonds with a young macaque. Two refugees from a Thai circus, young mother Sampit and her son Sawadee, get a second chance at living semi-wild on a pre-release island.

programme.title: Rooted
programme.desc: This is the incredible story of a tree that has been around for eight hundred years - that can withstand the harshest conditions - and that is more loved by insects, birds and animals than any other - the enormous Baobab. Rooted on the savannah of Malilangwe Game Reserve in southern Zimbabwe.

programme.desc: Winter is the ultimate challenge. As temperatures plunge across much of America, some animals escape to milder climes of the South, while others stay put and tough out the brutal cold and blizzards that blanket the North.

programme.desc: Watch senior vet Tim tutor new recruit Phil through an injured koala checkup, and track the teams solutions for animals plagued by the summer heat. Celebrate as vet Karina solves a puzzling frog case and releases an old friend whos ready to fly.
